seoTitle: Wilgena vs Willalooka — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wilgena and Willalooka. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wilgena and Willalooka.
heading: Wilgena vs Willalooka — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wilgena, South Australia and Willalooka, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Willalooka has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Wilgena (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wilgena or Willalooka safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wilgena has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Willalooka scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wilgena scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Willalooka scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wilgena or Willalooka?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Willalooka has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
